Canoness in Paragon Warsuit.name: Canoness in Paragon Warsuit
Canoness in Paragon Warsuit.equipped_with: A Canoness in Paragon Warsuit is equipped with: Heavy flamer; Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Paragon war blade; 2 Storm bolters.

option_groups.header: Only one Canoness or Canoness in Paragon Warsuit per army.
May swap both Storm bolters
May swap the Heavy flamer
May swap the Paragon war blade

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Emperor's Grace: Select two units during your Reinforcement phase with the Shield of Faith ability. The units gain the "Warded" ability until the end of the current battle round.
Paragon bodyguard: The Canoness may join a unit of Paragon Warsuits.
Pious: A Canoness increases the Faith Points by +2.

Geminae Superia.name: Geminae Superia
Geminae Superia.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Power sword.

option_groups.header: For every Living Saint or Palatine selection, the army may include one Geminae Superia unit that does not take up an HQ slot.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Hit & Run, Shield of Faith
Saintly Visage: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

Living Saint.name: Living Saint
Living Saint.equipped_with: A Living Saint is equipped with: Ardent Blade.

option_groups.header: Only one Living Saint per army.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Fearless, Shield of Faith
Armour of Saint Catherine: This model has a 4+ invulnerability save.
Pious: A Living Saint increases Faith Points by +3. If she is removed as a casualty and Miraculous Intervention is not being used, the Faith Points do not increase but are reduced by 1D6.

Missionary.name: Missionary
Missionary.equipped_with: A Missionary is equipped with: Frag grenades.
abilities: Faithful: Can recite 2 hymns per battle round. A hymn is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. Knows all Hymns of Battle.
Most Pious: A Missionary increases the Faith Points during each Reinforcement phase by 1D3.
Rosarius: This model has a 4+ invulnerability save.

Palatine.name: Palatine
Palatine.equipped_with: A Palatine is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Only one Canoness or Canoness in Paragon Warsuit per army.
One Palatine per army can be upgraded to a Canoness for +15 points.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Canoness: A Canoness may use Emperor's Grace a second time.
Emperor's Grace: Select one unit during your Reinforcement phase with the Shield of Faith ability. The unit gains the "Warded" ability until the end of the current battle round.
Pious: A Palatine increases the Faith Points by +1, a Canoness by +2.

Battle Sisters Squad.name: Battle Sisters Squad
Battle Sisters Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boltgun; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: For every 5 models, one Battle Sister may swap their Boltgun
One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
The Sister Superior may be upgraded to a Veteran Superior for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Veteran Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Sisters Novitiate.name: Sisters Novitiate
Sisters Novitiate.equipped_with: Every Sister Novitiate is equipped with: Autogun; Auto pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Two Sister Novitiate may swap their Autoguns
All Sister Novitiate may swap their Autoguns
One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
The Sister Superior may be upgraded to a Veteran Superior for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Veteran Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.
In training: The army can't have more units of Sister Novitiates than it has Battle Sisters squads.

Arco-flagellants.name: Arco-flagellants
Arco-flagellants.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Arco flail.
abilities: Berserk(5+), Blind rage
Concession: One unit of Arco-flagellants can be selected for each Preacher that does not occupy an Elite slot.

Celestian Insidiants.name: Celestian Insidiants
Celestian Insidiants.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Condemnor Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Null mace.

option_groups.header: One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
One model may receive a Denuncia oratory for +5 points.
Up to two Celestia Insidiants may swap their Condemnor bolt pistols
Up to two Celestia Insidiants may swap their Null maces
One Celestia Insidiants may swap their Condemnor bolt pistol and Null mace

abilities: Acts of Faith, Aegis(4+), Infiltrator, Shield of Faith
Denuncia oratory: While the model is alive, the unit gains the "Favoured Enemy(everything)" ability.
Pious: An Insidiant Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Celestian Sacresants.name: Celestian Sacresants
Celestian Sacresants.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Hallowed mace; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
All Celestia Sacresant may swap their Hallowed mace
The Sacresant Superior may swap her Hallowed mace

abilities: Acts of Faith, Bodyguard, Deflect, Parry, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Sacresant Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Celestian Squad.name: Celestian Squad
Celestian Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boltgun; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Two Celestians may swap their Boltguns
One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Bodyguard, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Celestian Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Crusaders.name: Crusaders
Crusaders.equipped_with: A Crusader is equipped with: Power sword; Storm shield.
abilities: Command squad, Deflect, Parry
Concession: One unit of Crusaders can be selected for each Preacher that does not occupy an Elite slot.
Crusade: The model and its attached unit gain the "Frenzy(1")" ability and roll 2D6 (pick highest) for the extra movement with an Advance order.

Dogmata.name: Dogmata
Dogmata.equipped_with: A Dogmata is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Mace of the righteous.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Command squad, Shield of Faith
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Dogmata may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.
Faithful: Can recite 1 hymn per battle round. A hymn is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. Knows one Hymn of Battle.

Unwavering Resolve: The Dogmata and an attached unit get a 5+ invulnerability saving throw as long as she is within 3" of a mission objective. Does not work against weapons with a Strength of 8 or higher.

Hospitaller.name: Hospitaller
Hospitaller.equipped_with: A Hospitaler is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Command squad, Shield of Faith
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Hospitaller may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.

Narthecium: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.

Imagifier.name: Imagifier
Imagifier.equipped_with: A Imagifier is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Command squad, Shield of Faith
Advisor: For every HQ selection, one Imagifier may be selected without taking up an Elite slot.

Litany of Glorious Deeds: At the start of each activation, the Imagifier may choose a legend for themselves and an attached unit:
1. Legend of the Devout - The unit gains +1" Movement.
2. Legend of the Defiant - The unit gains +1 Toughness.
3. Legend of the Warriors - The unit gains +1 Strength.
The effect lasts until the Imagifier's next activation.

Paragon Warsuits.name: Paragon Warsuits
Paragon Warsuits.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Heavy flamer; Paragon war blade; 2 Storm bolters.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap both Storm bolters
Each model may swap the Heavy flamer
Each model may swap the Paragon war blade

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Paragon Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Preacher.name: Preacher
Preacher.equipped_with: A Preacher is equipped with: Frag grenades.
abilities: Command squad
Faithful: Can recite 1 hymn per battle round. A hymn is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. Knows one Hymn of Battle.
Rosarius: This model has a 4+ invulnerability save.

Repentia Squad.name: Repentia Squad
Repentia Squad.equipped_with: Every Repentia is equipped with: Eviscerator.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Berserk(5+), Blind rage
Shield of Faith: The Repentia Superior has a 6+ invulnerability save.

Dominion Squad.name: Dominion Squad
Dominion Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boltgun; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Up to four Dominions may swap their Boltgun
One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
The Sister Superior may be upgraded to a Veteran Superior for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith, Vanguard
Pious: A Veteran Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Seraphim Squad.name: Seraphim Squad
Seraphim Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: 2 Bolt pistols; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Up to two Seraphim may swap both Bolt pistols

abilities: Acts of Faith, Hit & Run, Shield of Faith
Angelic Visage: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Pious: A Seraphim Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Zephyrim Squad.name: Zephyrim Squad
Zephyrim Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades; Power sword.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Hit & Run, Shield of Faith
Angelic Visage: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Pious: A Zephyrim Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Castigator.name: Castigator
Castigator.equipped_with: A Castigator is equipped with: Castigator autocannon; 3 Heavy bolters.

option_groups.header: May swap the Castigator autocannon
Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith

Exorcist.name: Exorcist
Exorcist.equipped_with: An Exorcist is equipped with: Exorcist missile launcher; Heavy bolter.
abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith

Penitent Engines.name: Penitent Engines
Penitent Engines.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: 2 Heavy flamers; 2 Penitent flail.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap both Penitent flails
Each model may swap both Heavy flamers

abilities: Berserk(5+), Blind rage

Retributor Squad.name: Retributor Squad
Retributor Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boltgun; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: Up to four Retributors may swap their Boltgun
One model may receive a Simulacrum (see Armory) for +5 points.
The Sister Superior may be upgraded to a Veteran Superior for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Pious: A Veteran Superior increases the Faith Points by +1.

Immolator.name: Immolator
Immolator.equipped_with: An Immolator is equipped with: Heavy bolter; Twin Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: May swap both Heavy flamers

abilities: Acts of Faith, Shield of Faith
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 6 infantry models, excluding excluding "Massive(x)" models.

Rhino.name: Rhino
Rhino.equipped_with: A Rhino is equipped with: Storm bolter.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Acts of Faith, Fire hatches(2), Shield of Faith
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models, excluding excluding "Massive(x)" models.

weapons.name: Power stake
weapons.abilities: Always wounds psykers on 2+, Psykers suffer a  Peril of the Warp attack for each wound.

equipment.name: Anointment
equipment.desc: The models generates +1 Faith Point for the army.

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Armorium cherub
equipment.desc: The model or the attached unit can fire a weapon twice during one activation. Each unit can benefit from this effect only once per round. Ammo(1).

equipment.name: Auspex scanner
equipment.desc: If the unit has not already activated this turn, it may immediately use up its order and fire at an enemy unit within 18" that is deployed as reinforcement as if it had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

equipment.name: Blessed ammunition
equipment.desc: One bolt weapon of the model ignores cover. Must be purchased separately for each bolt weapon.

equipment.name: Blessing
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional Hymn of Battle. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Book of St. Lucius
equipment.desc: All friendly units within 6" always use their unmodified Leadership value for tests. Unique.

equipment.name: Censer cherub
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Haste(1")" ability.

equipment.name: Digital weapons
equipment.desc: The model can make one additional melee attack per round. S:2 AP:-4 D:1. Hits automatically wound.

equipment.name: Dominion
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Vanguard" ability. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Holy weapon
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains +1 Damage. The point cost for this equipment is the same as for the weapon that it enhances. Can only be used on weapons with D:1. Only for Palantines.

equipment.name: Jump pack
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement and the "Jump pack" rule. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model can reroll one hit roll with this weapon per round. Must be purchased separately for each weapon.

equipment.name: Order banner
equipment.desc: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unot gain +1 Attack. Unique.

equipment.name: Plate armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ armor save. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Power armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 3+ armor save. Not combinable with other armors.

equipment.name: Praesidium Protectiva
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Purity seal
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Relic of the order
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
equipment.desc: The unit receives a +1 bonus to the combat results and can benefit from a maximum of two Acts of Faith at the same time.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Anointment
equipment.desc: The models generates +1 Faith Point for the army.

equipment.name: Blessed ammunition
equipment.desc: One bolt weapon of the model ignores cover. Must be purchased separately for each bolt weapon.

equipment.name: Holy icon
equipment.desc: Friendly units within a 6" radius receive +1 to their Leadership value.

equipment.name: Holy promethium
equipment.desc: The Immolator's Twin heavy flamer gains +1 Strength and "Suppression".

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Blazing Ire
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack. Unique. Order of the Bloody Rose only.

equipment.name: Impervious to Pain
equipment.desc: Everytime the model uses an Act of Faith, it regains 1 Wound (to the maximum of its starting value). Unique. Order of the Valorous Heart only.

equipment.name: Light of the Divine
equipment.desc: Everytime the model uses an Act of Faith, it gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability for all melee attacks. Unique. Order of the Sacred Rose only.

equipment.name: Quicksilver Veil
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities. Unique. Order of the Argent Shroud only.

equipment.name: Shield Bearer
equipment.desc: Once per game, the model may gain a 3+ invulnerability save until the start of its next activation. Unique. Order of Our Martyred Lady only.

equipment.name: Terrible Knowledge
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Unique. Order of the Ebon Chalice only.

archetypes.name: Holy Vanguard
archetypes.desc:
- Dominions can be taken as Troops.
- Only Dominion units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- All Dominion models must start the game as passengers inside a transport.

archetypes.name: Penitent Crusade
archetypes.desc:
- Arco-flagellants and Repentia can be taken as Troops.
- For every 10 Arco-flagellant models one unit of Penitent Engines can be taken as Troops.
- Battle Sisters and Sisters Novitiate become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Shrine Wardens
archetypes.desc:
- Celestia Sacresantis can be taken as Troops.
- Battle Sisters and Sisters Novitiate become Elite choices.
- Arco-flagellants, Repentia and Penitent Engines can not be taken at all.

legacies.name: Blind Faith
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Valorous Heart in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Cleansing Flames
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Ebon Chalice in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Faith Is Our Shield
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Argent Shroud in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Honour The Martyrs
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of Our Martyred Lady in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Tear Them Down
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Bloody Rose in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: The Emperor's Judgement
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Sacred Rose in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: The Holy Trinity
legacies.desc: The army gains access to a third trait and must select these traits: Raging Fervour, Rites of Fire and Unshakeable Vengeance. All traits combined cost 10 points for each non-character units.

traits.name: Combined Conviction
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Deeds, not Words
traits.desc: The unit may treat all of its "Rapid Fire" weapons during its Activation as "Assault" weapons (f.e. Rapid Fire 1 becomes Assault 1).

traits.name: Devout Fanaticism
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Guided by the Emperor’s Will
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Holy Wrath
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Raging Fervour
traits.desc: Inferno pistols gain 1,5" range, Meltas gain 3" range and Multi-melta gain 6" range.

traits.name: Rites of Fire
traits.desc: Hand flamers gain 1,5" range, Flamers gain 3" range and Heavy flamers gain 6" range.

traits.name: Shield of Aversion
traits.desc: The unit can reroll one armor save per battle round.

traits.name: The Blood of Martyrs
traits.desc: If the unit is destroyed, it generates an additional Faith Point.

traits.name: The Emperor's Judgement
traits.desc: If the unit performs an Act of Faith, roll 1D6. On a 5+, the Faith Point is refunded.

traits.name: Unshakable Vengeance
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Bolt weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

Hymns of Battle.name: Catechism of Repugnance
Hymns of Battle.effect: Ranged attacks of the target within half weapon range gain an additional -1 AP.

Hymns of Battle.name: Psalm of Righteous Smiting
Hymns of Battle.effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.

Hymns of Battle.name: Refrain of Blazing Piety
Hymns of Battle.effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking.

Hymns of Battle.name: War Hymn
Hymns of Battle.effect: All models of the target gain +1 Attack.

Acts of Faith.name: Hand of the Emperor
Acts of Faith.effect: All models in the target unit receive +1 Strength.

Acts of Faith.name: Divine Guidance
Acts of Faith.effect: The unit's ranged weapons gain one of the following effects: Armor piercing(5+), Precision(5+), or Tank hunter.

Acts of Faith.name: The Passion
Acts of Faith.effect: The unit can still fight in melee even if its models have already been eliminated before their initiative step.

Acts of Faith.name: Light of the Emperor
Acts of Faith.effect: Psykers suffer a Perils of the Warp attack each time they fail to manifest and receive a -1 penalty to the attempt. An enemy psyker cannot be affected by this more than once per usage.

Acts of Faith.name: Devout Grip
Acts of Faith.effect: The unit ignores the hit penalty from "Advance" and "Charge" commands. Additionally, it can fire Rapid fire weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" command.

Acts of Faith.name: Divine Intervention
Acts of Faith.effect: A die that has just been rolled must be re-rolled (regardless of whether it is your own or your opponent's). Can only be used once per battle round.
